name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express provides small fast loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with multiple locations across the U.S.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates as a multi-service financial services company offering emergency cash solutions and alternative financial products. The company has maintained a network of physical store locations and provides same-day or next-day funding for qualifying customers seeking quick access to cash. Based on their website navigation and service menu, ACE has been operating this model for an extended period with established customer service infrastructure.

ACE Cash Express offers a range of emergency financial services including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, business services, and tax services. Their product lineup caters to consumers who need immediate access to funds or alternative financial services outside traditional banking channels. The company advertises online loan applications alongside in-store services, indicating a multi-channel approach to customer accessibility.

ACE distinguishes itself through its physical store network, allowing in-person service combined with online application options. The company offers multiple contact channels (phone and email for both general and internet operations) and maintains customer service dedicated to different inquiry types. Their breadth of services—spanning emergency loans, money transfers, and tax services—positions them as a one-stop alternative financial services provider rather than a single-product lender.

A significant limitation evident from the provided website data is that specific product details, interest rates, terms, eligibility requirements, and actual loan amounts are not accessible through these pages. The Colorado Denver location pages returned 404 errors, and state-specific restrictions are indicated ("this type of loan is not available in this state"), suggesting service availability varies significantly by geography. Consumers must contact ACE directly or visit physical locations to obtain concrete pricing and product information.
pros: Multiple service offerings in one location including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, and money transfers
Physical store network allowing in-person service and immediate assistance
Online loan application options available alongside traditional in-store services
Dedicated customer service with separate channels for general inquiries and online loan operations
Established multi-state presence with numerous locations
Tax services available at select locations for additional consumer financial needs
Same-day or next-day funding indicated for emergency cash needs
cons: Website product pages return 404 errors, making it difficult to access specific loan terms, rates, and eligibility requirements
Service availability varies by state and location with explicit state-based restrictions on certain loan types
Lack of transparent pricing, APR information, and loan terms publicly available on website
Limited ability to verify current operational status or service specifics for particular locations
No online rate calculator or pre-qualification tool accessible through the website
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash access with same-day or next-day funding in supported states
Borrowers who own vehicles and can use title as collateral for larger emergency loans
Individuals seeking bundled financial services (check cashing, bill payment, money transfer) at a single location
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers in supported states who need emergency cash with fast funding and prefer in-person service combined with online options. The primary caveat is that actual product terms, rates, and availability must be confirmed directly with the company or at a physical location, as the website does not provide transparent pricing or detailed eligibility information.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
